headline: Bunge Completes Acquisition of IFF’s Soy Protein Concentrate, Lecithin, and Crush Business
summary: ST. LOUIS, March 02, 2026--Bunge Completes Acquisition of IFF’s Soy Protein Concentrate, Lecithin, and Crush Business

raw.headline: Bunge Completes Acquisition of IFF’s Soy Protein Concentrate, Lecithin, and Crush Business
raw.summary: ST. LOUIS, March 02, 2026--Bunge Completes Acquisition of IFF’s Soy Protein Concentrate, Lecithin, and Crush Business

headline: IFF Completed the Divestiture of Soy Crush, Concentrates and Lecithin Businesses
summary: NEW YORK, March 02, 2026--IFF (NYSE: IFF) today announced that it has successfully completed the previously announced divestiture of its soy crush, concentrates and lecithin businesses to Bunge. This transaction does not include IFF’s soy isolates business.

raw.headline: IFF Completed the Divestiture of Soy Crush, Concentrates and Lecithin Businesses
